name: drawer
title: BTDrawer
description: Right-side sliding panel (D-Drawer). Renders via React createPortal into document.body. 400 px wide, full viewport height, rounded left corners, shadow cast leftward. Footer has two equal-width buttons (secondary left, primary right).

files.content:
export { BTDrawer } from './BTDrawer';
export type { BTDrawerProps, BTDrawerSide, BTDrawerButtonDirection } from './BTDrawer.types';
